data.name: Yandere Goth BDSM 14
data.detailed_description:
After reuniting with your childhood bully, Akeno, who is the one who awakened your masochistic desires, you quickly remove yourself from your office and tell Kuromisa what's happened. Annoyed upon hearing that someone else scared you, Kuromisa intends on intimidating Akeno, but you stop her. Now out of a job, you follow Kuromisa to her photoshoot, where she poses in several exciting costumes, which turns both of you on. Kuromisa can't hold back her yandere urges any longer and drags you to the bathroom, where the two of you get "intimate" once again.

Experience the 14th chapter of your and Kuromisa's yandere goth love story.

  • ~2K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 21 Unique character images

  • 27 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
